titleStmt.title: SII 41.469: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 469. (A.R. No. 683 of 1905.) Tiruvēḍagam, Nilakkōṭṭai Taluk, Madura District. On the east wall of the first prakara, right of entrance, of the Patrikāparamēśvara temple at Tiruvēḍagam.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Maravarman Sundara-Pāṇḍya I, Year 9 = 1225 A.D.

summary.p: Registers a copy of an old inscription belonging to the third regnal Year of Jaṭāvarman Śrīvallabha (= 1124 A.D.) reinscribed now as the old structure had to be rebuilt. The old inscription refers to a royal grant of the village called Aḻichiṟai Śrīkaraṇamaṅgalam in Ten-kallaka-nāḍu as tax-free dēvadāna for the deity Umāsahitar consecrated by the queen Puvaṉimuḻuduḍaiyāḷ in the temple. That grant is signed by a number of puravuvari-tiṇaikkaḷam officers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrīcoṇāṭu vaḻaṅkiyaruḷiya virait should be ‘śrī’ instead of ‘vīra’cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 9vatu Uṭaiyār ti
ruveṭakamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tirumalai jīrṇittu Iraṅka nācciyār cilaiyāle ceyvittaruḷat tirumalaiyil kalveṭṭuppaṭi Eṭuppu [.] tirumaṭantaiyuñ
ceyamaṭantaiyun tiruppuyaṅkaḷiliṉitiruppa Irunilamum perumaiyeyti yeṇṭicaiyuṅ koṭai niḻaṟṟa maṉṉava rellām vantiṟaiñci marapile
varumaṇi muṭicūṭit teṉkumariyum vaṭakaṅkaiyun tiraikkaṭalellaiyākap pārmuḻutuṅ kayalāṇai parantu ceṅkoluṭan varaimaṉṉiya virasimhā[sa]ṉattu
Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutalmatikkulam viḷakkiya komutaṟkoṟccaṭaiya paṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvallavatevaṟku yā
ṇṭu 3 vatu maturaikkoyiluḷḷālai Aḻakiyapāṇṭiyamaṇṭapattu paḷḷikkaṭṭil pāṇṭiyarācaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu puravuvari tiṇaikkaḷattār ceyya tiru
vāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi pākaṉūṟkūṟṟattut tevatāṉan tiruveṭakattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṭakamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil nampeṇṭukaḷil puvaṉimuḻutu
ṭaiyāḷ Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Umāskandasahitaṟku tiruppaṭimāṟṟu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷukkut teṉkallakanāṭṭu Aḻiciṟai [śrīka]raṇamaṅkalam paṇṭuṭai
yāraiyum paḻamperaiyunikkik kārāṇmai mitāṭcciyum Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyilitevatāṉamākap peṟa veṇumeṉṟu nampeṇṭukaḷil pu
vaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ namakkuc colla Antarāyam Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyilitevatāṉamāka Iṭṭa Aḻiciṟaiyāṉa śrīkaraṇamaṅkalattukku Ellai kiḻellai Uṭaiyā
r tiruvālavāyuṭaiyār tevatāṉam poṉṉamaṅkalattu melellaikku meṟum tiṟalār melellaikku teṟkum Uṭaiyār tiruppūvaṇa muṭaiya nā
yaṉār tevatāṉam kallūr vaṭavellaikku vaṭakkum melellai ciṟucāttanūrk kiḻellaikku kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Uṭaiyār tirumuṭaṅkai nāyaṉār tevatāṉam karu
māttūr teṉellaikkut teṟkum vaṭavellai Uṭaiyār tiruvālavāyuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatāṉam vaḷḷaikkuḷattu teṉellaikku teṟkum Iṉṉāṉkellaikku
Uṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun nattappāḻum Uṭpaṭa kārāṇmai mitāṭciyum Antarāyamuṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka yāṇṭu 3 va
tu mutal Iṭṭukkuṭukka veṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai cuntarapāṇṭiyak kumaṇarāyaṉ Eḻu
ttu § yāṇṭu 3 vatu mutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku puravari pākaṉūṟkūṟṟattu tevatāṉan tiruveṭakattu Uṭaiyār tiruveṭakamuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Umāskandasahitaṟku Amu
tupaṭi Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku yāṇṭu 3vatu mutal tevatāṉam Iṟaiyiliyākat teṉkallakanāṭṭu Aḻiciṟaiyāṉa śrīkaraṇamaṅkalattu Iṉṉāṉ ke
llaikku Uṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum karuñcey puṉceyyum nattamun nattappāḻum Uṭpaṭa Iṟaiyili tevatāṉamāka Antarāyamum Uṭpaṭa tiruvāykeḻvipaṭi Iṭṭamaikku puravari
tiṇaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi kāṭantaik kuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravaritiṇaikaḷa nāyakam kāvaṉūr kiḻavaṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivai kuṭanāṭṭu vaāṟṟūruṭaiyāṉ Ā
ṉai caṅkaratevaṉāṉa viraviccātiramuventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivai puravaritiṉaikkaḷattu mukaveṭṭi Ālaṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam
po muṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivai villavaṉ pallavaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivai śrīvallauttaramantiri Eḻuttu .... Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷattu nā[yakam poyalūruṭai
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravarittiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam Ālantūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .... Ivaipuravari tiṇaikkaḷanāyakam puḷiṅkuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu ....ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷattu
mukaveṭṭi vallamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu .... Iśśilālekhyam paṇṇiṉṉeṉ Ikkoyil śilvācāryyan civallavaṉāṉa pākaṉūrkūṟṟattu Ācāryyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.469 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
